selected_sources.topic: Inguinal hernias (adult primary care referral pathway; UK/Scotland-facing)

tier1_always: Right Decisions national NHS Scotland pathway
NHS Scotland territorial board pathways (NHS Highland, NHS Borders)
tier2_selected: Royal College of Surgeons / British Hernia Society commissioning guidance
AOMRC EBI best-practice statement for minimally symptomatic inguinal hernia
search_strategy.tier3_justification: Not required: Tier1+Tier2 gave consistent referral-threshold signals for primary care triage.

shortlisted_sources.title: NICE CKS: Hernia - inguinal
shortlisted_sources.reason: Required Tier1 source family (NICE/CKS); extraction showed licensing/access page rather than clinical content.

shortlisted_sources.title: SIGN guidelines index
shortlisted_sources.reason: Tier1 requirement check for Scottish national guideline; no inguinal-hernia-specific SIGN guideline identified.

shortlisted_sources.title: Inguinal hernia pathway
shortlisted_sources.reason: Core Scotland-facing pathway framing, includes ACRT/Opt-In model and references to HerniaSurge updates.

shortlisted_sources.title: Groin hernia pathway (Guidelines)
shortlisted_sources.reason: Territorial board detail for primary/secondary care handling, conservative management and imaging caveats.

shortlisted_sources.title: Hernia
shortlisted_sources.publisher: NHS Borders RefHelp via Right Decisions
shortlisted_sources.reason: Territorial board referral route and primary-care referral population definitions.

shortlisted_sources.title: Commissioning guide: Groin hernia
shortlisted_sources.publisher: Royal College of Surgeons / ASGBI / British Hernia Society
shortlisted_sources.reason: UK specialty referral thresholds: emergency/urgent/routine distinctions and imaging/referral advice for primary care.

shortlisted_sources.title: Repair of minimally symptomatic inguinal hernia
shortlisted_sources.reason: Current UK best-practice statement for watchful waiting and urgent referral for women with suspected groin hernia.

shortlisted_sources.title: General surgery pathway: Inguinal hernia
shortlisted_sources.reason: Operational UK pathway context including watchful waiting criteria and escalation of acutely incarcerated/strangulated cases.

summary: Migrated from legacy pathway_runs format to canonical pathways format.
